description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a large garage door, a main entrance with an arched transom window, and a small balcony or terrace area above the garage. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some wooden accents on doors and interior furnishings visible through open sections. Windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern, with several grouped on the side and rear elevations. The interior layout is partially visible, showing a living area, kitchen, and bedrooms, with open spaces and minimalistic decor.
description: A modern, flat-roofed, single-story bungalow with a large garage, white exterior, and asymmetrical window arrangement. Features include wooden doors, a small balcony, and visible interior spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, main entrance with arched window, and a balcony/terrace above the garage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open interior layout, kitchen, and grouped windows; detached wall elements are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long row of windows and doors, with more of the interior visible through open sections.
description_view_3: Back corner view highlighting the flat roof, rear windows, and the spatial arrangement of rooms inside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
